children.name: Lady Elizabeth Boyd of Bonshaw (Countess of Lochleven) **** daughter of Archibald ‘The Red of Bonshaw’ Boyd and Lady Christian Mure.

zh.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Mure於1456年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III43歲，母親Lady Euphame Kennedy46歲。她和Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1523年1月28日之後在蘇格蘭度福利爾，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Mure于1456年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III43岁，母亲Lady Euphame Kennedy46岁。她和Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1523年1月28日之后在苏格兰度福利爾，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Mure was born in 1456, in Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III, was 43 and her mother, Lady Euphame Kennedy, was 46. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. She died after 28 January 1523, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Mure est née en 1456, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Euphame Kennedy, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. Elle est décédée après 28 janvier 1523, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Mure 1456 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Euphame Kennedy 46. Sie hatte mit Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 28. Januar 1523 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Mure è nata il nel 1456 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Euphame Kennedy, aveva 46 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. Morì dopo il 28 gennaio 1523, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイア

ja.Dumfriesshire, , Scotland, United Kingdo: イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイア
ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Christian Mureが1456年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan IIIは43歳，母Lady Euphame Kennedyは46歳であった。彼女はArchibald Boyd of Bonshawとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1523年1月28日以後にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Mure(이)가 1456년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Euphame Kennedy(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 1월 28일 이후 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Mure nasceu em 1456, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Euphame Kennedy, tinha 46 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. Ela faleceu após 28 de janeiro de 1523, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Mure родилась в 1456 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Euphame Kennedy, 46. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. Она умерла после 28 январь 1523 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Mure nació en 1456, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Euphame Kennedy, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw. Murió después de 28 de enero de 1523, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, y fue sepultada en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
